decisions.thesis: Q1 2026 EPS IDR 890 vs consensus IDR 416 — 114% beat unreacted. Newcastle coal $131/t +40.5% YoY.

decisions.reasoning: ITMG opened at IDR 26,075 — below planned entry range 27,000-27,200, giving a better price with unchanged thesis. All 15 gates passed. Position sized via risk formula: (0.5% equity) / (entry - hard-cut) = 27,300 shares = 7.12% of equity. BBRI skipped: ex-div April 21, pre-div price 3,440 far above post-div plan 3,200-3,250 (Gate 9 fail + hard-cut risk). ANTM skipped: price 4,010 above researcher's own entry ceiling of 3,960.

decisions.reasoning: Re-evaluate April 21 at post-ex-div open. Target entry: IDR 3,200-3,250.

Ex-dividend April 21 (IDR 209/share, 10.1% yield); BlackRock +19M shares in April accumulation
ESDM HPM Decree 144 raised ore correction factor 17%→30%; nickel $17,635 (+4.81% MoM)

Bank Indonesia holds BI-Rate at 4.75%; Governor: cut scope increasingly limited due to IDR pressure

Newcastle coal consolidating at $131/ton after March surge; Middle East risk premium intact (+40.5% YoY)
Rupiah at 17,115/USD near record lows; BI focused on stability over growth
